titleStmt.title: SII 34.378: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 378. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 17th year = A.D. 1233.

This records that three kaikkōḷas of the temple of Sundara-Chōḻīśvara at Kūḻai-kuḷattūr in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam of Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu purchased some land in the village and gifted it to the temple as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu
vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 I
raṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa cōḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟattūṟ kūṟṟattu
kkūḻai kuḷattūruṭaiyār cuntara cōḷīccaramuṭai
ya nāyaṉāṟku Ikkōyiṟ kaikkōḷaṉ kaṇṇaṉ Oḷiyaṉum
kaṇṇaṉ Ariyāṉum kaṇṇaṉ Aracaṉum Immūvōm nāṅkaḷ
Ivvūr vayalil vilai koṇṭa tāḻañceyyum Iḷaiyar vayalil vilaiko
ṇṭa kāñcirañ ceyyum Itaṉ paṟikālum cilaiyōṭu ceyyum Ātti
yōṭu vaṭṭam taṭi mūṉṟum Ākat taṭi yēḻum kuṭi nīṅkāt tēvatāṉamāka
tiruccūlakkallum nāṭṭik kalveṭṭik kuṭuttu Iṉ nilaṅkaḷ nāṅkaḷē kuṭi nīṅ
kāt tēvatāṉamāka Uḻutu Āṭṭaikku vāṭākkaṭamai cūlakkālāl pacāṉa
ttukku tāḻañ ceyku Aḷakkum nel Iru tūṇiyum kāñcirañceykkum paṟikālukkum
nelluk kalanē tūṇip patakkum cilaiyōṭu ceykku nelluk kalanē patakkum Ātti
yōṭu vaṭṭam taṭi mūṉṟukkum nelluk kalanē patakku Ippaṭi Aḷappōmākavum navirai
lu pātiyum Aṟpacik kuṟuvaikku Araiyē yaraikkālum yeḷ tiṉai varaku payaṟu viḷaiyil
Ivviḻukkāṭṭilē yaḷappatākavum peruveḷḷap peruñcāvi pōkil payirpāttuk koḷvatā
kavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavakal celvatāka kal veṭṭikkuṭuttōm Ikkōyil tēvaraṭiyāḷ
kaḷ Oḷiyār Uḷḷiṭṭōm
Digital edition of SII 34.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
